overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the character Aloy walking through the tribal settlement of Salt Bite. The scene transitions from dark blue hour through shallow water to a vibrant red sunset along the waterfront, ending in the settlement center with large wooden structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow lagoon approach to tribal settlement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow water toward the Salt Bite settlement entrance

entered.detail: calm reflective water covering the ground surface
tall white mineral formations rising from the water
distant wooden structures with red accents on the shore
snow-capped mountains visible in the distance against dark sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a shallow lagoon during the blue hour, approaching the tribal settlement of Salt Bite. Large white rock pillars rise from the water on the right, while the dark silhouette of the settlement and mountains looms ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: shoreline transition zone with wooden barricades

events.description: sky transitions from dark blue to vibrant pink and orange as the sun sets
exits shallow water onto dry stone walkway and gravel shore

agents.ego_description: transitioning from water to land while approaching the main settlement structures

entered.detail: gravel and stone path replacing the shallow water
large wooden structure with thatched roof and red decorative elements
spiked wooden fences lining the path

segments.scene_description: Dramatic lighting change occurs as the sky turns vibrant pink. The character exits the water onto a stone gravel path, passing wooden barricades and approaching the main tribal longhouse structures.

events.description: first encounter with NPC villagers standing along the waterfront path

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade past standing villagers and docks

notable_agents.action: villager holding a spear standing by the water's edge
villager observing the lagoon from the wooden dock

entered.detail: pier extending into the water with tribal decorations
small rock formations visible in the lagoon water

segments.scene_description: Walking along the waterfront promenade during a vibrant red sunset. NPC villagers stand along the path observing the water, while wooden docks extend into the lagoon. The mountains reflect the dramatic pink and red sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal settlement center with ceremonial structures

events.description: sun becomes visible on the horizon creating strong backlight and red glow

agents.ego_description: walking through the main settlement center toward the large ceremonial structure

notable_agents.action: villager in ceremonial clothing standing near the entrance

entered.detail: large triangular entrance structure made of logs and thatch
tall sharp red crystalline formations decorating the entrance
traditional straw roofing on nearby huts

segments.scene_description: The character enters the heart of the settlement with massive wooden ceremonial structures and red crystal spires. The setting sun creates a dramatic backlight effect, illuminating the thatched roofs and tribal decorations as villagers stand by the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a coastal tribal settlement as the atmosphere shifts from a cool blue hour to a vibrant red sunset. It begins with the character wading through a shallow lagoon beside towering white rock pillars, moving toward the dark silhouettes of mountains and distant buildings. As the sky transforms into a vivid pink, the camera follows the character exiting the water onto a stone gravel path lined with wooden barricades. The scene then opens onto a waterfront promenade where NPC villagers gather by wooden docks, while the surrounding mountains reflect the deepening red and pink hues of the horizon. Finally, the movement leads into the heart of the settlement, passing under massive wooden ceremonial structures and red crystal spires that are dramatically backlit by the setting sun.
